title: 1,000 days of Annavaasal: Erode’s dusk meal mission feeds over 2.5 lakh people
description: Every evening between 6 p.m. and 6.30 p.m., volunteers serve idlis with kurma. Depending on sponsors’ contributions, items such as chapati, tomato rice, fruits, biscuits, and eggs are also provided. On average, about 250 people are fed daily
